title: Job Opening Category Manager at Plum Holdings Services

jsonLd.title: Job Opening Category Manager at Plum Holdings Services
jsonLd.description:
Plum Holdings Services invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Category Manager at our Jodhpur location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About Plum Holdings Services:
Plum Holdings Services is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Execute digital marketing campaigns across Google, Meta, and other channels
• Optimize product pages for search visibility and conversion
• Conduct competitor analysis and market benchmarking
• Build and maintain affiliate and influencer marketing programs
• Develop and implement category growth strategies
• Analyze sales data and customer behavior to drive revenue growth
• Collaborate with logistics partners to ensure timely delivery

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Sc / M.Sc in Life Sciences
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in Shopify
• Proficiency in Facebook Ads
• Proficiency in WooCommerce
• Proficiency in Affiliate Marketing
• Proficiency in Product Management
• Proficiency in SEO/SEM
• Proficiency in Customer Segmentation

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Jodhpur, Rajasthan, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Plum Holdings Services!
